runs.final_dockerfile:
# Build and run Circuit from source using Go modules in a GOPATH-style workspace
FROM golang:1.26-bookworm

# Use a GOPATH-based workspace but enable Go modules for dependency management
ENV GOPATH=/go/workspace
ENV PATH=$PATH:/go/workspace/bin
ENV GO111MODULE=on

# Install required system dependencies
RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -yqq mercurial git gcc make

# Copy the repository into the GOPATH-based workspace
WORKDIR /go/workspace/src/github.com/gocircuit/circuit
COPY . .

# Initialize go.mod and tidy dependencies
RUN go mod init github.com/gocircuit/circuit || true
RUN go mod tidy

# Build the project from source using the nix target (produces GOPATH/bin/circuit)
RUN make nix

# Run the built Circuit CLI by default
CMD ["circuit", "start"]

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build and run Circuit from source in GOPATH-based workspace
FROM golang:1.26-bookworm

# Use a GOPATH-based workflow
ENV GOPATH=/go/workspace
ENV PATH=$PATH:/go/workspace/bin

# Install required system dependencies
RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -yqq mercurial git gcc

# Build in GOPATH workspace; copy source into GOPATH-compatible path
WORKDIR /go/workspace/src/github.com/gocircuit/circuit
COPY . .

# Build the project from source using the nix target (produces GOPATH/bin/circuit)
RUN make nix

# Run the built Circuit CLI by default
CMD ["circuit", "start"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build and run Circuit from source in GOPATH-based workspace
FROM golang:1.26-bookworm

# Use a GOPATH-based workflow
ENV GOPATH=/go/workspace
ENV PATH=$PATH:/go/workspace/bin
ENV GO111MODULE=off

# Install required system dependencies
RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -yqq mercurial git gcc make

# Build in GOPATH workspace; copy source into GOPATH-compatible path
WORKDIR /go/workspace/src/github.com/gocircuit/circuit
COPY . .

# Build the project from source using the nix target (produces GOPATH/bin/circuit)
RUN make nix

# Run the built Circuit CLI by default
CMD ["circuit", "start"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build and run Circuit from source in GOPATH-based workspace
FROM golang:1.26-bookworm

# Use a GOPATH-based workflow
ENV GOPATH=/go/workspace
ENV PATH=$PATH:/go/workspace/bin
ENV GO111MODULE=off

# Install required system dependencies
RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -yqq mercurial git gcc make

# Build in GOPATH workspace; copy source into GOPATH-compatible path
WORKDIR /go/workspace/src/github.com/gocircuit/circuit
COPY . .

# Pre-fetch external dependencies required by GOPATH-based build
RUN go get github.com/pkg/errors github.com/urfave/cli || true

# Build the project from source using the nix target (produces GOPATH/bin/circuit)
RUN make nix

# Run the built Circuit CLI by default
CMD ["circuit", "start"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build and run Circuit from source using Go modules in a GOPATH-style workspace
FROM golang:1.26-bookworm

# Use a GOPATH-based workspace but enable Go modules for dependency management
ENV GOPATH=/go/workspace
ENV PATH=$PATH:/go/workspace/bin
ENV GO111MODULE=on

# Install required system dependencies
RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -yqq mercurial git gcc make

# Copy the repository into the GOPATH-based workspace
WORKDIR /go/workspace/src/github.com/gocircuit/circuit
COPY . .

# Initialize go.mod and tidy dependencies
RUN go mod init github.com/gocircuit/circuit || true
RUN go mod tidy

# Build the project from source using the nix target (produces GOPATH/bin/circuit)
RUN make nix

# Run the built Circuit CLI by default
CMD ["circuit", "start"]
"}

# Build and run Circuit from source using Go modules in a GOPATH-style workspace
FROM golang:1.26-bookworm

# Use a GOPATH-based workspace but enable Go modules for dependency management
ENV GOPATH=/go/workspace
ENV PATH=$PATH:/go/workspace/bin
ENV GO111MODULE=on

# Install required system dependencies
RUN apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -yqq mercurial git gcc make

# Copy the repository into the GOPATH-based workspace
WORKDIR /go/workspace/src/github.com/gocircuit/circuit
COPY . .

# Initialize go.mod and tidy dependencies
RUN go mod init github.com/gocircuit/circuit || true
RUN go mod tidy

# Build the project from source using the nix target (produces GOPATH/bin/circuit)
RUN make nix

# Run the built Circuit CLI by default
CMD ["circuit", "start"]
